subject: 1.0.9 crashes at BoxNet retraining
body:
Warp crashes every time I try to retrain the BoxNet model and press the 
"Start Training". PC restart does not help. Crash info:

System.InvalidOperationException: The calling thread cannot access this 
object because a different thread owns it.
   at System.Windows.Threading.Dispatcher.VerifyAccess()
   at 
MahApps.Metro.Controls.Dialogs.DialogManager.ShowMessageAsync(MetroWindow 
window, String title, String message, MessageDialogStyle style, 
MetroDialogSettings settings)
   at 
Warp.Controls.BoxNetTrain.<>c__DisplayClass15_0.<<ButtonRetrain2_OnClick>b__0>d.MoveNext() 
in D:\Dev\warp2\Warp\Controls\BoxNet\BoxNetTrain.xaml.cs:line 108
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at 
System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter.HandleNonSuccessAndDebuggerNotification(Task 
task)
   at Warp.Controls.BoxNetTrain.<ButtonRetrain2_OnClick>d__15.MoveNext() in 
D:\Dev\warp2\Warp\Controls\BoxNet\BoxNetTrain.xaml.cs:line 504
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.InternalRealCall(Delegate 
callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs)
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.TryCatchWhen(Object source, 
Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs, Delegate catchHandler)
   at System.Windows.Threading.Dispatcher.VerifyAccess()
   at 
MahApps.Metro.Controls.Dialogs.DialogManager.ShowMessageAsync(MetroWindow 
window, String title, String message, MessageDialogStyle style, 
MetroDialogSettings settings)
   at 
Warp.Controls.BoxNetTrain.<>c__DisplayClass15_0.<<ButtonRetrain2_OnClick>b__0>d.MoveNext() 
in D:\Dev\warp2\Warp\Controls\BoxNet\BoxNetTrain.xaml.cs:line 108
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at 
System.Runtime.CompilerServices.TaskAwaiter.HandleNonSuccessAndDebuggerNotification(Task 
task)
   at Warp.Controls.BoxNetTrain.<ButtonRetrain2_OnClick>d__15.MoveNext() in 
D:\Dev\warp2\Warp\Controls\BoxNet\BoxNetTrain.xaml.cs:line 504
--- End of stack trace from previous location where exception was thrown ---
   at System.Runtime.ExceptionServices.ExceptionDispatchInfo.Throw()
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.InternalRealCall(Delegate 
callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs)
   at System.Windows.Threading.ExceptionWrapper.TryCatchWhen(Object source, 
Delegate callback, Object args, Int32 numArgs, Delegate catchHandler)
